response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video and used on-screen text (OCR) to identify two distinct songs: 'Guru Guru Mawaro Mawa Luna' by Kaaria and 'Mamotte Lu-Knight' by Nanahoshi Orchestra. 2. Identified the performer as Himemori Luna. 3. Formulated search queries: 'Guru Guru Mawaro Mawa Luna Kaaria Japanese and English lyrics' and 'Mamotte Lu-Knight Nanahoshi Orchestra Japanese and English lyrics'. 4. The searches did not return definitive lyric pages for these specific original songs, so I have set the lyrics fields to null as instructed.
response.global_summary: A concert segment featuring two original songs performed by virtual YouTuber Himemori Luna, titled 'Guru Guru Mawaro Mawa Luna' and 'Mamotte Lu-Knight', followed by a short speaking segment.

scenes.description: Himemori Luna performs the song 'Guru Guru Mawaro Mawa Luna'. On-screen text displays the song title and artist.
Himemori Luna performs the song 'Mamotte Lu-Knight'. On-screen text displays the song title and artist credits.
